epic.title: Phase 2+ / scale (cross-cutting placeholders)
epic.summary: Program-level capability deliberately deferred beyond v1 and not owned by a single feature PRD — the SaaS/scale layer. Tracked as placeholders so scope is visible and can be pulled forward if the business case appears. (Per-feature deferrals live as placeholder stories inside their own PRD epics.)

stories.title: Multi-location switching UI (placeholder)
stories.context: Switching between locations/clinics in one tenant. The data model is location-aware; the switching UX is deferred.
stories.i_want: to switch between locations in one place
stories.so_that: I run several clinics from one login
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 2+; data model already carries Location.
detail: Placeholder (Phase 2+): switching between locations/clinics in one tenant. The data model is already location-aware (Location on every relevant entity), so this is the switching UX + cross-location reporting rollups — built on PLATFORM/CLINIC-SWITCH. Captured so reporting/booking stay location-aware.

tasks.title: Placeholder: location switching UX + cross-location rollups (Phase 2+)
tasks.note: Deferred. Switching UX + cross-location reporting rollups on the already location-aware model; built on PLATFORM/CLINIC-SWITCH. Not built in v1.

stories.title: SaaS onboarding & billing UI (placeholder)
stories.context: Self-service tenant sign-up, subscription billing and per-tenant Entra federation for selling the platform as SaaS (PRD-01 non-goal; Phase 3).
stories.i_want: to sign up for the platform myself and pay a subscription
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 3; v1 provisions tenants manually.
detail: Placeholder (Phase 3): self-service tenant sign-up, subscription billing and per-tenant Entra federation to sell the platform as SaaS. v1 provisions tenants manually; tenancy/identity are already SaaS-ready (RLS isolation, Entra auth). Captured so tenancy/identity stay SaaS-ready.

tasks.title: Placeholder: self-service onboarding + subscription billing (Phase 3)
tasks.note: Deferred. Self-service tenant sign-up, subscription billing and per-tenant Entra federation on top of the already SaaS-ready tenancy/identity. Not built in v1.

stories.title: Per-tenant white-label theming (placeholder)
stories.context: Per-tenant branding/theming of web and apps (PRD-01 non-goal).
stories.i_want: to brand the platform with my clinic's look
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 2+; design tokens are themeable by construction.
Captured so the design system stays token-driven.
detail: Placeholder (Phase 2+): per-tenant branding/theming of web and apps. The design system is token-driven, so theming is a matter of per-tenant token sets (colours, logo, type) applied to web + Flutter apps — a per-tenant theme store + application layer, no component redesign. Captured so the design system stays token-driven.

tasks.title: Placeholder: per-tenant white-label theming (Phase 2+)
tasks.note: Deferred. Per-tenant token sets (colours, logo, type) applied to web + Flutter apps via a TenantTheme store + application layer; the design system is already token-driven. Not built in v1.

stories.title: Public API & webhooks (placeholder)
stories.context: Outbound/inbound public API + webhooks for third parties (PRD-10 deferred; Phase 3).
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 3; internal API is OpenAPI-described already.
Captured so the API stays contract-first.
detail: Placeholder (Phase 3): an outbound/inbound public API + webhooks for third parties. The internal API is already OpenAPI-described and contract-first, so this is auth (API keys/scopes), rate-limiting and versioning on a public surface + reliable webhook delivery (signed payloads, retries) on top. Captured so the API stays contract-first.

tasks.title: Placeholder: public API + webhooks (Phase 3)
tasks.note: Deferred. Public-surface auth (API keys/scopes), rate-limiting and versioning + webhook delivery (signed payloads, retries) on the already contract-first OpenAPI internal API. Not built in v1.

stories.title: Native POS hardware & tablet kiosk mode (placeholder)
stories.context: Native POS hardware integration and a tablet kiosk mode (PRD-06/09 non-goals).
stories.i_want: native POS hardware and a kiosk check-in mode
stories.so_that: the desk and waiting room are smoother
acceptance: Placeholder — Phase 2+; v1 uses Square card-present + in-app flows.
detail: Placeholder (Phase 2+): native POS hardware integration and a tablet kiosk check-in mode. v1 uses Square card-present + the in-app/web flows (the CHECKIN-KIOSK reception self-check-in surface already covers self-service check-in as a locked-down web surface); checkout and check-in are designed to stay hardware-friendly. Captured so checkout/check-in stay hardware-friendly.

tasks.title: Placeholder: native POS hardware + native kiosk mode (Phase 2+)
tasks.note: Deferred. Dedicated POS hardware integration + a hardened native kiosk mode beyond v1's Square card-present and the web self-check-in surface (CHECKIN-KIOSK). Not built in v1.
